title: Immersive Interfaces - Cosmetic Armor Reworked
description: This texture pack adds special compatibility with Cosmetic Armor Reworked, integrating its grooves into the aesthetics of Immersive Interfaces.
body: **Bundle Texture Pack Compat** [**Immersive Interfaces - Mod Support Unofficial**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/immersive-interfaces-mod-support-unofficial) ### Immersive Interfaces - Mod Support Unofficial This texture pack adds special compatibility with Cosmetic Armor Reworked, integrating its grooves into the aesthetics of Immersive Interfaces. ### Before: ![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a185169474cf211b223bd8c41f724a407f9f1b1.png) ### After: ![b](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff2b20d877825dae75af7c81ade5f34f76e2ad23.png)
